reviewed_head.subject: Re-implement bounded slice tri-lane-conversations-api-inventory-001 after iteration-0002 review by narrowing the slice to prepared-for-rebase

review_scope.basis: bounded batch execution under merged contract layer
review_scope.limitation: bounded slice executed in dry-run contract mode; implement review is still required before verify

verdict.summary: preparatory bounded-slice artifacts for the conversations_api OpenAI rebase were emitted and validated; the lane itself is not yet fully rebased and implement review is still pending

findings.summary: Prepared the conversations_api inventory for OpenAI-backed rebase while retaining the observed Codex workbench extract as the provisional source runtime root.
Defined the conversations_api review-bundle boundary and required checks for the first bounded slice against the ACM contract freeze.
Added ACM-owned OpenAI Responses + Conversations contract schemas and manifest so the paused lane can be rebased on the official API surface.

next_patch_set: Complete the actual conversations_api lane rebase against the ACM/OpenAI contract
Run implement review before any verify transition
Keep promotion pending until the lane rebase is complete
